rules.name: Idle Virtual Machine
rules.description: VM CPU < {cpu_idle_pct}% average over 7 days. Deallocate or delete.

rules.name: Oversized Virtual Machine
rules.description: VM CPU < {cpu_oversize_pct}% and memory < {mem_idle_pct}%. Downsize SKU.

rules.name: Spot VM Opportunity
rules.description: Batch/dev/test workloads on on-demand VMs. Spot pricing saves up to 90%.

rules.name: Stopped (Not Deallocated) VM
rules.description: VM is stopped but still incurring compute charges. Deallocate it.

rules.name: VM Without Reserved Instance
rules.description: Running VM with no reservation. 1-yr RI saves ~40%, 3-yr ~60%.

rules.name: Extended VM Underutilization
rules.description: VM sustained low CPU and memory over evaluation window with sufficient cost to justify action.

rules.name: Missing Governance Tags
rules.description: Resource is missing required ownership, environment, or cost allocation tags.

rules.name: VM Blocked by Disk I/O
rules.description: VM shows low CPU but attached disk IOPS are saturated — do not downsize the VM first.

rules.name: VM Blocked by Network Throughput
rules.description: VM network interface shows saturation — validate throughput before rightsizing compute.

rules.name: VM Family Right-Sizing
rules.description: Suggest smaller VM family or burstable family when workload shape is consistently low.

rules.name: VM SKU rightsizing
rules.description: CPU and memory utilization suggest a smaller or larger VM SKU within or across families.

rules.name: VM Schedule Optimization Candidate
rules.description: VM is frequently stopped or deallocated — automate shutdown or delete if unused.

rules.name: VM Stopped But Still Billing
rules.description: VM is stopped (not deallocated) and may still incur compute charges.

rules.name: Zombie VM Candidate
rules.description: VM runs continuously with near-zero CPU — strong delete or decommission candidate.

rules.name: Oversized Disk (Premium → Standard)
rules.description: Premium SSD disk on a stopped/idle VM. Downgrade to Standard SSD.

rules.name: Unattached Managed Disk
rules.description: Managed disk not attached to any VM. Delete or snapshot-then-delete.

rules.name: Extended Unused Disk Detection
rules.description: Disk is unattached long enough to be considered waste, or attached with idle I/O on large disks.

settings.label: Min disk size for idle I/O check

rules.name: Oversized Premium Disk
rules.description: Premium SSD disk shows near-zero I/O and may be downgraded to Standard SSD.

rules.name: Under-Provisioned Managed Disk
rules.description: Premium or Ultra disk IOPS or throughput is near the provisioned cap — increase size or tier before cost cuts.

rules.name: Old Disk Snapshot (>90 days)
rules.description: Snapshots older than 90 days accumulate cost. Review and delete.

rules.name: Extended Snapshot Retention
rules.description: Snapshots older than the retention threshold should be removed after recovery validation.

rules.name: Empty App Service Plan
rules.description: App Service Plan with no hosted apps. Delete or consolidate workloads.

rules.name: Empty App Service Plan
rules.description: App Service Plan hosts no web apps. Delete or consolidate workloads.

rules.name: Idle Web App
rules.description: Web app has low request volume or is stopped on a paid plan.

rules.name: Over-Provisioned App Service Plan
rules.description: Premium/isolated plan hosting few apps. Downgrade SKU or consolidate apps.

rules.name: Underutilized App Service Plan
rules.description: Plan CPU and memory utilization are consistently low. Downgrade SKU.

rules.name: Extended App Service Plan Waste
rules.description: Empty or over-provisioned App Service Plans create recurring platform cost.

rules.name: Production Web App Without Always On
rules.description: Production web apps should enable Always On to avoid cold-start waste and failed health checks.

rules.name: Production Web App Without Always On
rules.description: Production web apps should enable Always On to avoid cold starts and failed health probes.

rules.name: Stopped Web App on Paid Plan
rules.description: Stopped web apps still consume App Service Plan capacity — consolidate or delete.

rules.name: Idle App Service plan
rules.description: Eliminate App Service plan charges with no hosted apps

rules.name: AKS Cluster on Old Kubernetes Version
rules.description: Cluster is not on a supported N or N-1 version. Upgrade for security + cost efficiency.

rules.name: Cluster Autoscaler Disabled
rules.description: No autoscaler = permanently over-provisioned nodes. Enable cluster autoscaler.

rules.name: Dev/Staging Cluster Running Outside Business Hours
rules.description: Non-prod cluster running 24/7. Enable start-stop schedule ({cluster_dev_hours}).

rules.name: Empty AKS Node Pool
rules.description: Node pool has zero nodes or no schedulable capacity. Remove or resize the pool.

rules.name: Idle AKS Node
rules.description: Node CPU < {node_cpu_idle}% and mem < {node_mem_idle}%. Enable cluster autoscaler.

rules.name: Node Pool Not Using Spot VMs
rules.description: System node pool is fine on on-demand. User/batch pools can use Spot (up to 90% savings).

rules.name: Over-Provisioned Node Pool
rules.description: Node count consistently above actual scheduling needs. Reduce max nodes.

rules.name: Single Node Pool Architecture
rules.description: All workloads on one pool. Split system vs user pools for cost + resilience.

rules.name: AKS Cluster Underutilized
rules.description: Cluster node CPU and memory are consistently low — scale down node pools or enable cluster autoscaler.

rules.name: AKS Node Pool Consolidation
rules.description: Node pool can run on fewer nodes based on aggregate CPU and memory headroom.

rules.name: AKS Node Pool Without Autoscaler
rules.description: Node pool has fixed node count without cluster autoscaler enabled.

rules.name: AKS Non-Prod Scheduling
rules.description: Non-production clusters should use shutdown schedules or scale-to-zero patterns where possible.

rules.name: AKS Single Node Pool
rules.description: Cluster has only one node pool — workloads share system and user nodes.

rules.name: AKS System Pool Reliability Baseline
rules.description: Production system pools should maintain minimum healthy node count for reliability.

rules.name: AKS Unsupported Kubernetes Version
rules.description: Cluster runs a Kubernetes version outside the supported set and should be upgraded.

rules.name: AKS User Pool Not Using Spot
rules.description: User node pool uses on-demand VMs where Spot nodes could reduce cost.

rules.name: Extended AKS Idle Pool Detection
rules.description: Node pool has too many idle nodes relative to total pool size.

rules.name: Hot Storage Account — Low Activity
rules.description: Storage account on Hot tier with no transactions > {storage_days_unused} days. Move to Cool/Archive.

rules.name: LRS Replication on Critical Data
rules.description: Storage using Locally Redundant Storage. Consider GRS/ZRS for resilience (cost tradeoff).

rules.name: No Blob Lifecycle Policy
rules.description: Storage account missing lifecycle management. Add tiering rules to auto-move cold data.

rules.name: Storage Geo-Redundancy Review
rules.description: GRS/GZRS storage accounts cost more than LRS — validate redundancy requirements per workload.

rules.name: Storage Hot Tier Review
rules.description: Storage account on Hot tier should be validated for active access patterns.

rules.name: Storage LRS Resilience Tradeoff
rules.description: Locally redundant storage may not meet geo-resilience requirements for critical data.

rules.name: Storage Lifecycle Candidate
rules.description: Storage accounts without lifecycle management should be reviewed for tiering and archival.

rules.name: Unassociated Public IP Address
rules.description: Static Public IP not associated with any resource. Incurring idle charges. Delete it.

rules.name: Extended Public IP Idle Detection
rules.description: Unassociated static public IPs create direct monthly waste.

rules.name: Unattached Network Interface
rules.description: NIC not attached to a VM or other resource. Delete after confirming no dependency.

rules.name: Orphaned Network Interface
rules.description: NICs detached from VMs still incur minor management overhead and clutter inventory.

rules.name: Unattached network interface
rules.description: Remove orphaned NICs and any associated public IP charges

rules.name: Idle NAT Gateway
rules.description: NAT Gateway with no associated subnets. Costs ~$32+/mo idle. Delete or attach subnets.

rules.name: Extended Idle NAT Gateway
rules.description: NAT Gateway without subnet associations is pure idle spend.

rules.name: Idle NAT gateway
rules.description: Reclaim fixed hourly NAT gateway charges

rules.name: Orphaned Network Security Group
rules.description: NSG is not associated with any subnet or network interface and should be removed.

rules.name: Overly Permissive NSG Rules
rules.description: NSG allows broad inbound access from the internet on sensitive ports.

rules.name: Load Balancer With Empty Backend Pool
rules.description: Load Balancer has no backend instances. Idle Standard LB costs ~$18/mo. Delete it.

rules.name: Extended Idle Load Balancer Detection
rules.description: Load balancers without backend instances create avoidable network spend.

rules.name: Application Gateway With No Listeners
rules.description: Application Gateway has no active listeners. Costs ~$125+/mo idle. Delete or consolidate.

rules.name: Extended Idle Application Gateway Detection
rules.description: Application gateways without listeners should be deleted or reconfigured.

rules.name: Azure Firewall Fixed Cost Review
rules.description: Dedicated firewall SKU incurs significant fixed monthly cost.

rules.name: CDN / Front Door Egress Review
rules.description: CDN or Front Door profile has significant egress-related spend.

rules.name: Orphaned Private Endpoint
rules.description: Private endpoint has no approved connection or target resource — review for deletion.

rules.name: Private Endpoint Connection Failed
rules.description: Private endpoint connection is rejected or failed — fix or delete to stop hourly charges.

rules.name: Unused Private Link Service
rules.description: Private link service has no private endpoint connections.

rules.name: Azure Firewall fixed cost review
rules.description: Validate dedicated firewall necessity

rules.name: Bandwidth and peering review
rules.description: Identify cross-region or internet egress drivers

rules.name: CDN / Front Door egress review
rules.description: Reduce content delivery and egress charges

rules.name: Private endpoint spend review
rules.description: Validate private endpoint necessity and connection count

rules.name: Private link service spend review
rules.description: Review private link service connections and visibility

rules.name: Empty Private DNS Zone
rules.description: Private DNS zone has no record sets beyond SOA/NS — delete if unused.

rules.name: Virtual Network Peering Review
rules.description: VNet peering and cross-region data transfer can drive recurring network spend.

rules.name: Cost Spike Detected
rules.description: Service daily spend increased significantly versus the prior-week baseline.

rules.name: Idle SQL Database
rules.description: SQL DB DTU/vCore utilization < {db_dtu_idle_pct}% for 7 days. Pause (serverless) or delete.

rules.name: SQL DB Not Using Serverless Tier
rules.description: Dev/test SQL databases on provisioned compute. Switch to Serverless for auto-pause savings.

rules.name: Idle SQL Database
rules.description: SQL database shows sustained low CPU utilization on provisioned tier.

rules.name: SQL Serverless Candidate
rules.description: Low-utilization SQL databases should move to serverless when supported.

rules.name: PostgreSQL Burstable Candidate
rules.description: Non-production PostgreSQL workloads on General Purpose tiers should use Burstable SKUs.

rules.name: PostgreSQL Storage Right-Sizing
rules.description: PostgreSQL storage is provisioned well above typical usage and should be reviewed.

rules.name: Stopped PostgreSQL Server
rules.description: PostgreSQL flexible server is stopped but may still incur storage and backup charges.

rules.name: Stopped flexible database server
rules.description: Reduce storage and backup charges on stopped database servers

rules.name: Cosmos DB on Provisioned Throughput
rules.description: Low-traffic Cosmos DB using provisioned RU/s. Switch to autoscale or serverless.

rules.name: Cosmos Autoscale Candidate
rules.description: Low steady utilization suggests autoscale or serverless is cheaper than provisioned throughput.

rules.name: Cosmos DB Not Serverless
rules.description: Cosmos account uses provisioned throughput without serverless capability enabled.

rules.name: Cosmos DB Serverless Candidate
rules.description: Low steady RU consumption supports serverless or autoscale instead of fixed provisioned throughput.

rules.name: Failed Redis Cache
rules.description: Azure Cache for Redis in Failed provisioning state. Delete and recreate or open support ticket.

rules.name: Oversized Redis Cache
rules.description: Premium Redis tier may exceed workload needs. Review SKU and shard count.

rules.name: Redis Health and Recovery
rules.description: Failed Redis caches should be remediated immediately.

rules.name: Redis Right-Sizing Candidate
rules.description: Premium or high-capacity Redis SKUs should be validated against actual memory pressure.

rules.name: Redis Tier and Shard Review
rules.description: Premium or high shard count may exceed workload needs — validate SKU and eviction policy.

rules.name: ACR Geo-Replication Cost
rules.description: Geo-replicated registries multiply storage and transfer cost — validate business need.

rules.name: ACR High Storage Usage
rules.description: Registries with high storage and low activity should review image cleanup policies.

rules.name: ACR Premium SKU Review
rules.description: Premium container registry SKU may be unnecessary for dev/test or low-throughput workloads.

rules.name: ACR Retention Policy Disabled
rules.description: Premium registries with high storage should enable untagged manifest retention.

rules.name: ACR Standard SKU Review
rules.description: Standard SKU registries with low pull volume and storage may downgrade to Basic.

rules.name: Application Insights Sampling Review
rules.description: Application Insights component lacks adaptive sampling with significant ingestion cost.

rules.name: Log Analytics Retention Review
rules.description: Workspace retention or ingestion volume suggests cost optimization opportunity.

rules.name: Application Insights sampling
rules.description: Lower telemetry ingestion without losing signal

rules.name: Log Analytics ingestion review
rules.description: Reduce observability ingestion cost

rules.name: API Management SKU Review
rules.description: API Management tier or capacity units may be over-provisioned for workload.

rules.name: Data Factory Integration Runtime Review
rules.description: Self-hosted or over-provisioned integration runtimes increase pipeline cost.

rules.name: Logic App Plan Review
rules.description: Logic App uses Standard plan for low-volume intermittent workloads.

rules.name: API Management SKU review
rules.description: Right-size API gateway capacity

rules.name: Azure Data Factory spend review
rules.description: Optimize pipeline and IR runtime cost

rules.name: Logic App run history retention
rules.description: Reduce workflow storage and execution charges

rules.name: Event Hubs Tier Review
rules.description: Event Hubs namespace tier or throughput units exceed actual usage.

rules.name: Service Bus Tier Review
rules.description: Service Bus namespace uses Premium tier where Standard may suffice.

rules.name: Event Hubs throughput review
rules.description: Align messaging capacity with actual throughput

rules.description: Reduce messaging fixed capacity cost

rules.name: Azure Data Explorer Ingestion Review
rules.description: ADX cluster ingestion or retention policies may be over-provisioned.

rules.name: Databricks Cluster Review
rules.description: Databricks workspace lacks auto-termination or uses all-purpose clusters inefficiently.

rules.name: ML Workspace Compute Review
rules.description: ML workspace has idle compute clusters or over-provisioned endpoints.

rules.name: Synapse Pause and Scale Review
rules.description: Synapse dedicated SQL pool runs continuously without pause schedule.

rules.description: Optimize ADX cluster and retention cost

rules.description: Reduce ML training and endpoint cost

rules.name: Azure Synapse pause and scale
rules.description: Reduce warehouse idle compute cost

rules.name: Backup Vault Retention Review
rules.description: Recovery Services vault retention or protected item count suggests storage growth.

rules.description: Lower backup storage growth

rules.name: AI Search SKU Review
rules.description: Search service replicas or partitions exceed query volume requirements.

rules.name: AI Search SKU review
rules.description: Right-size search replicas and partitions

rules.name: Key Vault Soft Delete Disabled
rules.description: Key Vault without soft delete or purge protection. Accidental deletion is irrecoverable.

rules.name: Idle Key Vault
rules.description: Vaults with negligible API activity may be unused and safe to consolidate or delete.

rules.name: Key Vault High API Volume
rules.description: High API hit volume increases per-operation charges — cache secrets and reduce polling.

rules.name: Key Vault Premium SKU Review
rules.description: Premium SKU may be unnecessary when vaults store secrets only and have no HSM-backed keys.

rules.name: Key Vault Protection Baseline
rules.description: Key Vault should have soft delete and purge protection enabled for recoverability.

rules.name: Approaching Budget Limit
rules.description: Subscription spend at {budget_warn_pct}%+ of configured budget.

rules.name: Budget Limit Nearly Exceeded
rules.description: Subscription spend at {budget_crit_pct}%+ of configured budget. Immediate action required.

rules.name: Budget Critical Threshold
rules.description: Budget current or forecast spend is at or above the critical limit.

rules.name: Budget Guardrail Breach Risk
rules.description: Budget current or forecast spend is approaching the configured limit.

rules.name: Budget Warning Threshold
rules.description: Budget current or forecast spend is approaching the configured warning limit.

rules.name: Cosmos DB Serverless Candidate
rules.description: Low steady RU consumption supports serverless or autoscale instead of fixed provisioned throughput.

rules.name: Failed Redis Cache
rules.description: Azure Cache for Redis in Failed provisioning state. Delete and recreate or open support ticket.

rules.name: Oversized Redis Cache
rules.description: Premium Redis tier may exceed workload needs. Review SKU and shard count.

rules.name: Redis Health and Recovery
rules.description: Failed Redis caches should be remediated immediately.

rules.name: Redis Right-Sizing Candidate
rules.description: Premium or high-capacity Redis SKUs should be validated against actual memory pressure.

rules.name: Redis Tier and Shard Review
rules.description: Premium or high shard count may exceed workload needs — validate SKU and eviction policy.

rules.name: ACR Geo-Replication Cost
rules.description: Geo-replicated registries multiply storage and transfer cost — validate business need.

rules.name: ACR High Storage Usage
rules.description: Registries with high storage and low activity should review image cleanup policies.

rules.name: ACR Premium SKU Review
rules.description: Premium container registry SKU may be unnecessary for dev/test or low-throughput workloads.

rules.name: ACR Retention Policy Disabled
rules.description: Premium registries with high storage should enable untagged manifest retention.

rules.name: ACR Standard SKU Review
rules.description: Standard SKU registries with low pull volume and storage may downgrade to Basic.

rules.name: Application Insights Sampling Review
rules.description: Application Insights component lacks adaptive sampling with significant ingestion cost.

rules.name: Log Analytics Retention Review
rules.description: Workspace retention or ingestion volume suggests cost optimization opportunity.

rules.name: Application Insights sampling
rules.description: Lower telemetry ingestion without losing signal

rules.name: Log Analytics ingestion review
rules.description: Reduce observability ingestion cost

rules.name: API Management SKU Review
rules.description: API Management tier or capacity units may be over-provisioned for workload.

rules.name: Data Factory Integration Runtime Review
rules.description: Self-hosted or over-provisioned integration runtimes increase pipeline cost.

rules.name: Logic App Plan Review
rules.description: Logic App uses Standard plan for low-volume intermittent workloads.

rules.name: API Management SKU review
rules.description: Right-size API gateway capacity

rules.name: Azure Data Factory spend review
rules.description: Optimize pipeline and IR runtime cost

rules.name: Logic App run history retention
rules.description: Reduce workflow storage and execution charges

rules.name: Event Hubs Tier Review
rules.description: Event Hubs namespace tier or throughput units exceed actual usage.

rules.name: Service Bus Tier Review
rules.description: Service Bus namespace uses Premium tier where Standard may suffice.

rules.name: Event Hubs throughput review
rules.description: Align messaging capacity with actual throughput

rules.name: Service Bus tier review
rules.description: Reduce messaging fixed capacity cost

rules.name: Azure Data Explorer Ingestion Review
rules.description: ADX cluster ingestion or retention policies may be over-provisioned.

rules.name: Databricks Cluster Review
rules.description: Databricks workspace lacks auto-termination or uses all-purpose clusters inefficiently.

rules.name: ML Workspace Compute Review
rules.description: ML workspace has idle compute clusters or over-provisioned endpoints.

rules.name: Synapse Pause and Scale Review
rules.description: Synapse dedicated SQL pool runs continuously without pause schedule.

rules.name: Azure Data Explorer ingestion
rules.description: Optimize ADX cluster and retention cost

rules.name: Azure Databricks cluster review
rules.description: Cut analytics compute waste

rules.name: Azure ML workspace compute review
rules.description: Reduce ML training and endpoint cost

rules.name: Azure Synapse pause and scale
rules.description: Reduce warehouse idle compute cost

rules.name: Backup Vault Retention Review
rules.description: Recovery Services vault retention or protected item count suggests storage growth.

rules.name: Backup vault retention review
rules.description: Lower backup storage growth

rules.name: AI Search SKU Review
rules.description: Search service replicas or partitions exceed query volume requirements.

rules.name: AI Search SKU review
rules.description: Right-size search replicas and partitions

rules.name: Key Vault Soft Delete Disabled
rules.description: Key Vault without soft delete or purge protection. Accidental deletion is irrecoverable.

rules.name: Idle Key Vault
rules.description: Vaults with negligible API activity may be unused and safe to consolidate or delete.

rules.name: Key Vault High API Volume
rules.description: High API hit volume increases per-operation charges — cache secrets and reduce polling.

rules.name: Key Vault Premium SKU Review
rules.description: Premium SKU may be unnecessary when vaults store secrets only and have no HSM-backed keys.

rules.name: Key Vault Protection Baseline
rules.description: Key Vault should have soft delete and purge protection enabled for recoverability.

rules.name: Approaching Budget Limit
rules.description: Subscription spend at {budget_warn_pct}%+ of configured budget.

rules.name: Budget Limit Nearly Exceeded
rules.description: Subscription spend at {budget_crit_pct}%+ of configured budget. Immediate action required.

rules.name: Budget Critical Threshold
rules.description: Budget current or forecast spend is at or above the critical limit.

rules.name: Budget Guardrail Breach Risk
rules.description: Budget current or forecast spend is approaching the configured limit.

rules.name: Budget Warning Threshold
rules.description: Budget current or forecast spend is approaching the configured warning limit.

rules.name: Azure Savings Plan Opportunity
rules.description: Stable compute spend. Azure Savings Plan offers up to 65% discount across any VM family.

rules.name: Reserved Instance Opportunity
rules.description: Consistent VM usage detected. 1-yr RI saves ~40%, 3-yr ~60% vs pay-as-you-go.

rules.name: Reserved Instance Opportunity
rules.description: Subscription has sustained on-demand VM spend suitable for Reserved Instances.

rules.name: Reserved Instance or Savings Plan Candidate
rules.description: Stable-running VMs are candidates for Reservations or Savings Plans.

rules.name: Savings Plan Opportunity
rules.description: Subscription compute spend is eligible for Azure Savings Plans.

rules.name: Cost export only — not in Azure inventory
rules.description: Surfaces orphaned or untracked spend

rules.name: High monthly spend review
rules.description: Prioritize top spend drivers for rightsizing or decommission

rules.name: Unclassified service spend
rules.description: Surface spend on services without dedicated rules

rules.name: VMSS Non-Prod Scheduling
rules.description: Non-production scale set should use shutdown schedules or scale-to-zero.

rules.name: VMSS Without Autoscale
rules.description: Scale set has fixed instance count or autoscale profile with min equals max.
